commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=7d26c8608e15e2e3d3ac931577777b16c0c2da5b)
commands.review_summary:
The branch caches resolvedSkills in a bounded module-level Map, skips watcher target scans when debounce/config watch roots are unchanged, and adds focused skills/session tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding: source inspection shows a concrete path where one stripped snapshot can hydrate from another session’s cached resolvedSkills when workspace/version/raw skillFilter match but effective agent/config/eligibility differ. A focused unit test can reproduce this by mocking different effective skill outputs under the same cache key.
commands.review_followup: The code repair is narrow, but the external PR also needs contributor-provided real behavior proof for the module cache path, so this is not ready for an automated repair lane.
